name.description: MUST be strictly ONE WORD only (e.g., 'anxious', 'hopeful', 'determined')

key_insight.description: The single most meaningful observation from this conversation (1-2 sentences, written in second person directly to the user)

patterns.description: 2-3 recurring thought patterns or themes noticed across this conversation, written in second person

reflection_questions.description: 2-3 open, thought-provoking questions for the user to sit with — no answers, just prompts for deeper reflection

tips.description: 2-4 exploration cards for future The Room sessions

title.description: Short card title, 4-6 words, captures the essence of the topic

description.description: One sentence describing the specific topic or question to explore

framework_key.description: Framework best suited for this topic — choose based on content, not the current framework
